forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 48. North northwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 64, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. North northwest wind 9 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

weather_report:
In the serene hours of night, the air in Downtown San Francisco rests quietly between the gentle embrace of a cool breeze and the promise of a sun-drenched afternoon. As the low temperature hovers around 48 degrees, a north-northwest wind whispers through the streets at 13 mph, bringing with it a refreshing hint of clarity, free from the burdens of fog. The very essence of the Bay is awakening, untouched by the morning marine layer that so often veils this coastal city. Tomorrow graces us with a sunlit day, peaking at a comfortable 64 degrees, soon to settle into the mellow warmth of 62 as the afternoon unfurls.

On this lovely Thursday, light layers are your best companion; a sweater to ward off the evening chill and a light jacket to embrace the day’s gentle warmth will serve you well. With the sun in its full glory, consider a leisurely stroll along the waterfront or a quiet coffee at a local café, where the laughter of passersby infuses the air with a delightful hum. Embrace the subtle charm of this moment, where the city prepares to reveal its beauty, and perhaps share the day’s tranquility with a close friend beneath the brightening sky.
